name: ba_retrospective
description: Generate a BA retrospective report for a project by aggregating all ba_* tables (decisions, requirements, risks, stakeholders, KPIs). Returns metrics, open items, an overall health RAG status, and a formatted markdown report. Use at project milestones or closure (BABOK KA1.5, KA6).

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project name to generate retrospective for.

period.description: Optional ISO date range 'YYYY-MM-DD/YYYY-MM-DD' to filter by created_at.
